docs.title: #eng-general thread
docs.content:
Thread in #eng-general:
hank: heads up - touching prbe-payments repo for the Stripe upgrade. the billing-service will need a restart after deploy.
ivan: got it. i'll monitor Sentry during the window.

docs.title: Service Catalog
docs.content:
Service Catalog

billing-service: Handles Stripe subscriptions, invoicing, and webhook events. Repo: prbe-payments.

payment-service: Processes one-time charges and refunds. Repo: prbe-payments.

auth-service: OAuth, session tokens, JWT issuance. Repo: prbe-backend.

expected_edges.note: Slack message briefly mentions the prbe-payments repo by name in the context of a deploy
